definitions.usage_example: Music is good for the soul.
definitions.usage_example_es: La música es buena para el alma.
definitions.usage_context_en: The spiritual or non-physical part of a person.
definitions.usage_context_es: La parte espiritual o no física de una persona.

definitions.usage_context_en: The non-physical part of a person, seen as their true self; a person's mood or attitude.
definitions.usage_context_es: La parte no física de una persona, vista como su verdadero ser; el estado de ánimo o la actitud de una persona.

definitions.usage_example: He tried to hide his identity.
definitions.usage_context_en: The facts or characteristics that define who or what a person or thing is.
definitions.usage_context_es: Los hechos o características que definen quién o qué es una persona o cosa.

definitions.usage_example: His ego was hurt by the criticism.
definitions.usage_example_es: Su ego fue herido por la crítica.
definitions.usage_context_en: A person’s sense of self-importance or self.
definitions.usage_context_es: A person’s sense of self-importance or self.

definitions.usage_example: She is trying to understand her true self.
definitions.usage_example_es: Ella intenta entender su verdadero yo.
definitions.usage_context_en: A person’s identity or essential being.
definitions.usage_context_es: A person’s identity or essential being.
